# Pull Request

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] UK English only in all user-facing text and comments (no "color", "organize", "behavior" outside CSS)
- [ ] No em dashes or en dashes anywhere; use a hyphen, comma, or full stop
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] Docker image builds (`docker compose build`)
- [ ] No debug `console.log` statements left in
- [ ] New routes added to `public/sitemap.xml` if applicable

## House style

This project is owned by Epildevconnect Ltd (Company No. 17247566), registered in England and Wales. All written content uses UK English. The CI will fail if US spellings or long dashes are introduced.
